text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... I've really done it this time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Welp, something this minor'll heal in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So let's just forget this even happened and start
our training fresh!
choice_data_list: You gotta take it easy for a while.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, I'm fine. I just let my guard down for a
second...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Argh! Just thinking about it makes me mad! How
could I do something so dumb?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Seriously, I'm all okay now! Please stop fussing over me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Urp... Don't look at me like thaaat!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Are you doing this on purpose?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... So it's all unintentional. What am I going to do with you?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay, okay, I give up. I don't want to embarrass
myself any further.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't quite understand what she's saying, but I
manage to convince Nice Nature to get some
rest.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If you say it like that... I don't know, it makes me
feel guilty all of a sudden.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Arrrgh, no! I'm not going back on what I said!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps because I put too much pressure on her,
Nice Nature ends up getting worse...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Heh... You mean that, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll try to be more careful. It's the least I can
do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Nice Nature promised, she quickly recovers
from her injury... and her performance is better
than ever!
